name: A whole brand new world (Isekai)
description:
THIS WILL BE A BRAND NEW ADVENTURE!

THE WORLD WAS DESTROYED BUT THE HUMANITY WAS SAVED BY AN UNKNOW EVENT THAT SENT ALL OF IT TO ANOTHER WORLD WHO WAS BIGGER AND THAT CONTAINED ALL THE FANTASY ELEMENTS THAT YOU CAN FIND IN ANY BOOK!

You Just Turned 18 and you have to attend to your awakening cerimony.

Get ready for an Epic and long Adventure in this brand new world and have a lot of fun.

HI EVERYONE!

This Is my First bot on this site.

I know that probably There are Many mistakes but Hey It's my First time and english Isn't even my First language, I Hope you Will all like It.

If you want you can share your feedbacks and If You want you can even share your chats...if not don't worry and Just have fun doing anything you want.

Have a nice Day!
creator: Giulius
